label: pDC
evidence: The atlas paper (Gopee et al., 2024; DOI: 10.1038/s41586-024-08002-x) explicitly defines 'pDC' as 'plasmacytoid dendritic cells' in the UMAP visualization legend of integrated prenatal skin, adult skin, and SkO datasets (Fig. 1e). pDC is annotated as a fine-grained fetal immune cell type in the atlas cell type annotations. The abbreviation 'pDC' is a widely accepted standard abbreviation for plasmacytoid dendritic cells in immunology.
